author: IGN RSS
text:
George Miller Reportedly Wants to Make One More Mad Max Movie and a TV Show Before Selling the Franchise
Mad Max mastermind George Miller has reportedly begun seeking out Hollywood studios in hopes of making one last Mad Max movie, as well as a TV show, before he sells the rights to his universe to someone else.

author: IGN RSS
text:
X-Men '97 Season 2, Episodes 1-4 Review (Spoiler-Free)
X-Men ‘97 remains as thrilling as ever in the first four episodes of Season 2, delivering more of that winning blend of Marvel nostalgia and deep character drama. Read our spoiler-free review.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Milly Alcock Says Her Supergirl Cape Was Made With Material from Christopher Reeve's Superman Suit
When Milly Alcock makes her standalone debut as Kara Zor-El in Supergirl later this month, she'll do so while wearing portions of the material used to make the cape Christopher Reeve wore in Superman.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Jesse Eisenberg Turned Down The Social Reckoning Because He 'Has His Problems With' Mark Zuckerberg, Aaron Sorkin Says
The Social Reckoning writer and director Aaron Sorkin spent three days trying to convince Jesse Eisenberg to reprise his role as Facebook CEO Mark Zuckerberg before he ultimately turned him down.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Xbox Reportedly Speeding Up New Elder Scrolls, Fallout, and Halo Games as Microsoft Leaves Spinning Off the Business on the Table
A new report has claimed Xbox CEO Asha Sharma is speeding up development on new Halo, The Elder Scrolls, and Fallout games as Microsoft considers restructuring or spinning off its gaming branch.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Assassin's Creed: Black Flag Resynced New Content Detailed in Developer Deep Dive
Ubisoft has published a new Assassin's Creed: Black Flag Resynced deep dive, promising loads of new content that wasn't present in the original release.

After years of waiting and one big delay, director Matt Reeves has confirmed The Batman Part 2 has officially started filming by posting the first image from the set.
